controls.title: Default admin passwords rotated
controls.risk: Default or test passwords allow unauthorized production access.
controls.currentState: Test profile uses known local credentials for smoke validation.
controls.requiredEvidence: Production password rotation record and post-rotation login smoke.
blockingIssues: Production admin password rotation record is missing.
nextActions: Rotate all default admin and service-console passwords, then attach smoke evidence without recording secret values.

controls.title: Test accounts removed or tightly scoped
controls.risk: Test users or broad smoke accounts can survive production cutover.
controls.currentState: Test environment keeps smoke accounts for automated validation.
controls.requiredEvidence: Production account inventory, disabled test accounts and approved break-glass account list.
blockingIssues: Production account inventory and test-account cleanup evidence are missing.
nextActions: Export auth/user inventory, disable or scope test accounts, and attach approved break-glass ownership.

controls.title: Test runtime bypasses disabled
controls.risk: Test-only license or simulated-login bypasses can be promoted into production.
controls.currentState: Test deployment can seed license state and carries runtime patches for compatibility.
controls.requiredEvidence: Production config review proving test license seed, simulated login and debug bypasses are disabled or formally approved.
blockingIssues: Production runtime-bypass cleanup or approval evidence is missing.
nextActions: Review Nacos, Compose and runtime patch settings; attach signed evidence that test bypasses are disabled or approved through license decision.

controls.title: Service accounts use least privilege
controls.risk: Over-privileged service users can modify unrelated services or data.
controls.currentState: Production service-account privilege matrix is not attached.
controls.requiredEvidence: Service account inventory and privilege matrix reviewed by owner.
nextActions: Create service-account inventory for application, Keycloak, MinIO, Nacos and database users.

controls.title: Database users split by service and privilege
controls.risk: One shared database superuser hides write ownership and expands blast radius.
controls.currentState: Test Compose uses one PostgreSQL application user for repeatable smoke.
controls.requiredEvidence: Production PostgreSQL role/grant review and migration/runtime user split.
blockingIssues: Production PostgreSQL role/grant review is missing.
nextActions: Define migration user, runtime user and read-only audit user; attach grant review.

controls.title: Secrets stored outside git
controls.risk: Production credentials, private keys or license material can leak through repository artifacts.
controls.currentState: Repository templates use placeholders; production secret manager is not recorded.
controls.requiredEvidence: Secret inventory without values, approved secret-manager path and repository secret scan output.
blockingIssues: Production secret-manager path and secret inventory are missing.
nextActions: Record secret owners and approved storage locations without secret values; run repository secret scan.

controls.title: Client secrets and tokens rotated
controls.risk: Recovered or test Keycloak client secrets can remain valid in production.
controls.currentState: Keycloak production realm migration evidence has not attached client-secret rotation.
controls.requiredEvidence: Keycloak client-secret rotation record and post-rotation login/API smoke.
nextActions: Rotate production Keycloak clients and attach smoke evidence without recording secret values.

controls.title: Container images scanned
controls.risk: Base images and runtime layers can carry known vulnerabilities into production.
controls.currentState: Docker Compose image scan report is not attached.
controls.requiredEvidence: Image scan report, exception list and remediation owner for ADP Java, PostgreSQL, Redis, Mongo, MinIO and Nginx images.
blockingIssues: Container image scan report is missing.
nextActions: Run approved image scanner and attach report or accepted risk exceptions.

controls.title: Containers run as non-root where possible
controls.risk: Root containers increase host escape and filesystem damage blast radius.
controls.currentState: Production runtime user policy is not attached.
controls.requiredEvidence: Compose/Kubernetes runtime-user review and exception list for services that require root.
blockingIssues: Runtime user review and exceptions are missing.
nextActions: Review every production container user, add non-root policy where possible, and document exceptions.

controls.title: Host firewall and network boundary reviewed
controls.risk: Internal services can become internet-facing through host firewall or security-group drift.
controls.currentState: Network/TLS plan exists separately but security hardening needs firewall review signoff.
controls.requiredEvidence: Firewall or security-group export reviewed by infrastructure and security owners.
nextActions: Attach reviewed firewall/security-group export and cross-link the network/TLS READY evidence.

controls.title: Audit logs retained
controls.risk: Security and business actions cannot be investigated after production incidents.
controls.currentState: Production audit log retention config is not attached.
controls.requiredEvidence: Application, gateway, Keycloak, database and host log-retention configuration.
blockingIssues: Audit log retention evidence is missing.
nextActions: Define log retention period, storage location, query owner and privacy handling.

controls.title: Security alerting configured
controls.risk: Authentication failures, license failures, DB errors and suspicious access can go unnoticed.
controls.currentState: Production alert rules are not attached.
controls.requiredEvidence: Alert rules for authentication failures, service health, database errors, license state, certificate expiry and storage errors.
nextActions: Create alert rules and attach test firing or dashboard evidence.
